title: Tn polyagglutination syndrome; somatic mutation
summary: Tn polyagglutination syndrome; somatic mutation
detail: Tn polyagglutination syndrome is most often seen in males, and this *somatic* mutation has been reported to lead to it. However, note that this is a genotype that is way more common than Tn polyagglutination syndrome; in other words, there are a lot of people born with this genotype who do not show signs of Tn polyagglutination syndrome.
